assertion.label: Change Details
assertion.name: change_details
assertion.value: In Fig. 2b of this Review, gates 'Xa+c'and 'Zb' were swapped. This error has been corrected online.

assertion.name: Ethics
assertion.value: The authors declare no competing financial interests.
